## Summary

- What changed?
- Why was it needed?

## Validation

- [ ] I ran relevant tests locally
- [ ] I included logs/screenshots for behavior changes
- [ ] I updated docs where needed

## Risk

- [ ] No behavioral risk
- [ ] Low risk (localized)
- [ ] Medium/high risk (call out details below)

Risk notes:

## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets or private keys were committed
- [ ] CI workflow impact considered
- [ ] Backward compatibility considered
